SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-14-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TORRES, JULIO ROMAN LOPEZ, LORENA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YEE, THOMAS MING, CHAN KAM $167.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $227.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-14-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT YEE, THOMAS MING, CHAN KAM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT TORRES, JULIO ROMAN LOPEZ, LORENA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
